headline: Costco Wholesale Corporation issued a press release detailing its operating results for the second quarter of fiscal 2026 and sales results for the four weeks ended March 1, 2026.
investor_impact: This earnings release is a primary catalyst for the stock, providing critical visibility into Costco's recent financial performance. Investors and analysts will closely analyze the Q2 operating results and recent four-week sales trends to assess consumer demand, margin resilience, and membership metrics.
key_figures: First 24 weeks of fiscal 2026 ended February 15, 2026
Four weeks sales results ended March 1, 2026
Gary Millerchip (Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer)
